items.title: Survey Sunday: is Slate Auto’s affordable electric truck going to make it?
items.summary: For the last few weeks, we’ve been running a sidebar survey asking Electrek readers if they thought the new, affordable Slate electric truck was going to succeed in the ultra-competitive US market. After receiving nearly 3,000 responses, here’s what you told us.
items.translatedTitle: 周日调查： Slate Auto经济实惠的电动卡车会成功吗？

items.title: Pilot hits new EV milestone with 300th DC fast charging location
items.summary: Pilot travel centers are welcoming America’s summer road trippers with a number of new locations, an expanded, “coast-to-coast” EV charging network that offers 24/7 convenience and healthier c-store snacks and menu items.
items.translatedTitle: 试点通过第300个直流快速充电位置达到新的电动汽车里程碑

items.title: ASEAN Shifts Focus to Battery Manufacturing, Scaling EV Adoption, and Grid Integration
items.summary:
PUTRAJAYA, Malaysia — The rapid transition of Southeast Asia toward clean energy is moving from the early adoption of electric mobility to a regional industrialization effort. When the 4th ASEAN Battery Technology Conference opens next month in Sepang, Malaysia, the focus will pivot from policy framework proposals toward the engineering   ... [continued]
The post ASEAN Shifts Focus to Battery Manufacturing, Scaling EV Adoption, and Grid Integration appeared first on CleanTechnica.
items.translatedTitle: 东盟将重点转向电池制造、扩大电动汽车采用和电网集成

items.title: Geely Unveils New EV Powertrain That Is 93.8% Efficient
items.summary:
The name of the game for infernal combustion engines is to waste as much gasoline or diesel fuel as possible. In fact, observers like Bill McKibben note that, when everything is considered from well head to refinery to the pump to engine efficiency, only about 15 percent of the energy   ... [continued]

items.title: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
items.summary: The original Z80 packed 8,500 transistors on a 4μm process and typically ran at 2.5 MHz.
items.translatedTitle: Zilog Z80年满50岁，成为DIP40芯片（ 1976年7月推出， 2024年停产的标志性8位CPU ）的开源替换头

items.title: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' — SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm ‘chipflation’
items.summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won said that prices for memory chips are "abnormally high" and that the industry must take steps to increase production and reduce prices. If it fails to do that, new entrants could challenge the incumbent leaders and make the market much more competitive, especially once demand falls back down to more manageable levels.
items.translatedTitle: 内存芯片老板承认RAM价格“异常高” --SK集团董事长考虑在美国建设半导体工厂以扩大供应，平息“芯片通胀”

items.title: Nissan Sakura Keeps the Crown as Japan’s Best Selling EV
items.summary:
Four years into its run as the undisputed champion of the Japanese electric vehicle market, the Nissan Sakura is getting a mid-cycle refresh. The tiny kei car has single-handedly carried Nissan to the top of Japan’s EV sales charts since its 2022 debut, often accounting for nearly half of the   ... [continued]
The post Nissan Sakura Keeps the Crown as Japan’s Best Selling EV appeared first on CleanTechnica.

items.title: Crazed enthusiast runs PC on 192 AA batteries, successfully boots into Hannah Montana Linux — System is stable during stress testing and even plays FreeDoom
items.summary: A creator by the name of "Uwoslab" just jerry-rigged three battery banks together, each made up of 64 AA Alkaline cells, to form a giant 192-cell array that's enough to power an AM4 system.
items.translatedTitle: 疯狂的爱好者使用192节AA电池运行PC ，成功启动到Hannah Montana Linux —系统在压力测试期间稳定，甚至可以玩FreeDoom

items.title: VinFast Bets on Entrepreneurs with “Rentapasada” Program in the Philippines
items.summary:
Most automakers entering a new market concentrate on selling vehicles. VinFast is taking a different approach in the Philippines, where it is trying to create new business owners first. The Vietnamese electric vehicle manufacturer has expanded its Rentapasada (literally rent-to-hire) program, an initiative that allows Filipinos to launch a ride-hailing   ... [continued]
The post VinFast Bets on Entrepreneurs with “Rentapasada” Program in the Philippines appeared first on CleanTechnica.

items.title: New 6 passenger, 780-mile PHEV from GM has North America written all over it
items.summary: GM thinks its newest Starlight L PHEV SUV could be China’s best value hybrid, offering 260 km (~160 miles) of all-electric range, spacious six-passenger seating, and a modern technology package at an affordable price. And it’s exactly the kind of vehicle that the company could try to rebadge for North America
items.translatedTitle: 来自通用汽车的新6名乘客， 780英里的PHEV在北美到处写满
